template.name: recon_disbursement_bank_payment
template.description: Flush the Control balance through Suspense, completing the disbursement reconciliation cycle. Debit Suspense (10103) and credit Control (10102) on the economic ledger, with a mirror of Cash Balances - Suspense (11903) to Cash Balances - Control (11902) on the allocation ledger. After this fires, all temporary accounts (Clearing, Control, Suspense) net to zero for the matched amount. Structurally identical to UC1's T5407 (control flush).

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification on the economic ledger: Suspense (10103) decreases and Control (10102) decreases. Total assets unchanged.
Asset-to-asset reclassification on the allocation ledger: Cash Balances - Suspense (11903) decreases and Cash Balances - Control (11902) decreases. Total assets unchanged.

template.trigger: Reconciliation service matches the bank statement against Suspense. Fires once per bank statement match.

ledger_scope_descriptions.fdic_tracking: FDIC tracking ledger (ID 5002) where Cash Balances - Suspense is flushed against Cash Balances - Control for FDIC tracking.
ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where Suspense is flushed against Control to complete reconciliation.

accounting_treatments.description: Flush Suspense against Control to complete the disbursement reconciliation cycle.
Mirror the control flush on the allocation ledger for FDIC position tracking.

account_code_validations.description: Master FBO - Suspense on the economic ledger; debited to flush against Control.
Master FBO - Control on the economic ledger; credited to complete reconciliation.
Cash Balances - Master FBO Suspense on the allocation ledger; debited to flush.
Cash Balances - Master FBO Control on the allocation ledger; credited to complete.

legs.description: Flush Suspense against Control to complete the reconciliation cycle.
Mirror the control flush on the allocation ledger for FDIC tracking.

examples.name: recon_bank_payment_300
examples.description: Reconcile $300.00 bank statement: flush Suspense against Control on economic; flush CB Suspense against CB Control on allocation. Completes the reconciliation cycle.
